data.title: Victor Group Holdings Plans 2024 AGM with Online Access
data.description:
Victor Group Holdings Ltd (AU:VIG) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Victor Group Holdings Ltd will host its 2024 Annual General Meeting on January 10, 2025, in Shanghai, with an option to watch live online. Shareholders are encouraged to participate and submit proxy votes ahead of the meeting, as online voting is not available. The meeting will cover key financial reports and a resolution on adopting the Remuneration Report.

data.title: Elixinol Wellness Completes Securities Consolidation
data.description:
Elixinol Wellness (AU:EXL) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Elixinol Wellness Ltd has successfully completed a securities consolidation, now trading at one share for every eight previously held. Post-consolidation, the company has 219,178,485 fully paid ordinary shares and various options, with trading resuming under its usual tickers. This strategic move aims to streamline its capital structure, potentially impacting stock performance and investor interest.

data.title: Sembcorp Partners for Singapore’s First Renewable Energy Import
data.description:
Sembcorp Industries (SG:U96) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Sembcorp Industries has signed a groundbreaking two-year agreement with Tenaga Nasional Berhad to import 50MW of renewable energy into Singapore, marking the country’s first renewable energy import with Renewable Energy Certificates. This deal, part of Malaysia’s pilot for cross-border green electricity trading, utilizes existing infrastructure to ensure the sustainable sourcing of energy. Despite its significance, the agreement is not expected to impact Sembcorp’s financial metrics for 2024.

For further insights into SG:U96 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Aquila Acquisition Corp. Moves Forward with De-SPAC Strategy
data.description:
Aquila Acquisition Corp. Class A (HK:7836) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Aquila Acquisition Corp. is advancing its De-SPAC transaction by offering warrant holders a chance to redeem their holdings at HK$0.10 per warrant, contingent on necessary approvals. The transaction involves amendments to existing agreements and an extended deadline for completion, set for March 18, 2025. Additionally, the Successor Company plans to resubmit its New Listing Application following a lapse earlier this year.
